page: Vultr vcg-a40-6c-30g-12vram is a fractional GPU instance within the Cloud GPU family. It features an Intel x86_64 architecture with 6 shared vCPUs and 6 physical cores, operating at 1.0 thread per core. The instance is configured with 30.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 5.0 GB per core.

For hardware acceleration, the server is equipped with a fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU, representing a 0.25 slice of the physical card and delivering 12 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is provided by a 550 GB NVMe SSD, and the configuration includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

This resource profile is designed for workloads requiring GPU acceleration without the cost of a full dedicated GPU. The combination of fractional Ampere architecture, 30.0 GB of RAM, and NVMe storage makes this instance suitable for light machine learning inference, data analysis, graphics rendering, and development environments.
description: Vultr vcg-a40-6c-30g-12vram is a fractional GPU instance designed for workloads requiring moderate hardware acceleration. Built on the Intel x86_64 architecture, it features 6 shared vCPUs, 6 physical cores, and 30.0 GB of system memory. The server integrates a fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU, providing 12 GB of VRAM, which represents a 0.25 slice of the full GPU. Local storage is supported by a 550 GB NVMe SSD, and the instance includes one public IPv4 address. This configuration offers a cost-effective entry point for GPU-accelerated tasks, balancing shared CPU resources with dedicated graphics memory. It is suited for workloads such as light machine learning inference, small-scale data processing, and graphics rendering pipelines.
og_description: Vultr vcg-a40-6c-30g-12vram is a Cloud GPU instance featuring 6 shared Intel vCPUs, 30.0 GB of RAM, a 550 GB NVMe SSD, and a fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU with 12 GB of VRAM.

tagline: A fractional GPU instance featuring shared Intel processors, NVMe storage, and dedicated NVIDIA Ampere acceleration for entry-level parallel computing.
bullet_points: Fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU providing 12 GB of dedicated VRAM
6 shared Intel x86_64 vCPUs with 30.0 GB of system memory
550 GB of local NVMe SSD storage for fast data access
Includes one complimentary public IPv4 address
Suited for light machine learning inference and graphics rendering
